name: code-research
description: Evaluations for code-research skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger on explicit code-research invocations

prompts.input: code-research
prompts.reason: Direct skill name invocation

prompts.input: 帮我深入研究这个项目的架构设计
prompts.reason: Request to deeply research project architecture

prompts.input: I want to deeply understand this codebase's design philosophy
prompts.reason: Request to understand design philosophy matches skill description

prompts.input: 研究一下这个项目的核心机制和数据流
prompts.reason: Request to research core mechanisms and data flow

prompts.input: Give me a comprehensive understanding of how this project works, including key algorithms and architectural decisions
prompts.reason: Deep understanding request covering architectural decisions and algorithms

prompts.input: 分析这个项目的 commit history，梳理系统的演进路线和演进原因
prompts.reason: Request to research system evolution history and rationale from commits

prompts.input: 从第一性原理出发，重新思考如果从 0 设计这套系统应该怎么演进
prompts.reason: Request for first-principles design evolution analysis

prompts.input: Map the historical evolution of this codebase to the current implementation structure
prompts.reason: Request for implementation map connecting history to current code

prompts.input: code-research 分析这个项目的代码目录和结构，规划一条源码阅读路径
prompts.reason: Request for source reading path and directory structure analysis

prompts.input: code-research 我是后端工程师，前端基础比较薄弱，深入理解这个项目需要补哪些基础知识模块
prompts.reason: Request for prerequisite knowledge modules adapted to user background

prompts.input: code-research 站在源码作者 Day 0 视角，分析这套系统的需求、MVP 边界和技术方案
prompts.reason: Request for author Day 0 product and technical-solution reconstruction

prompts.input: code-research 帮我分析这个项目的代码质量，给我一份质量地图
prompts.reason: Request for source-backed code quality map

prompts.input: 深入研究这个仓库，顺便告诉我哪些模块最难维护
prompts.reason: Request for deep repository research plus maintainability risk analysis

prompts.input: I want a source-backed maintainability quality map for this codebase
prompts.reason: Request for quality map grounded in source evidence

evals.name: trigger-negative-surface-questions
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for surface-level or quick questions about code

prompts.input: What does this function do?
prompts.reason: Simple question about a single function, not deep research

prompts.input: Fix the bug in this file
prompts.reason: Bug fix request, not a research task

prompts.input: How do I install this project?
prompts.reason: Installation question, not deep code research

prompts.input: review 当前 diff 找 bug
prompts.reason: Diff bug review belongs to code-review, not code-research

prompts.input: 扫一下安全漏洞
prompts.reason: Security vulnerability scanning belongs to security-review

prompts.input: 帮我重构这段代码
prompts.reason: Refactoring request is code modification, not research
